title: Tier reward ladder — Bronze → Amethyst $/point table
html:
Reward-tier table screenshot (Bronze $1M / Silver $5M / Gold $15M / Platinum $50M / Diamond $100M / Amethyst $250M) — likely a SaaS-or-game progression ladder Yahir is mining for the brotein / outpace tier-system inspiration.

brotein · outpace · gaming loops · tier progression design
